---
title: "Use cases"
subtitle: "Three working professionals putting cybedtools to use"
listing:
  contents:
    - "k12-teacher.qmd"
    - "curriculum-coordinator.qmd"
    - "policy-analyst.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Scenario"
    description: "Who and what"
    categories: "Tags"
  sort: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 12
  table-striped: true
  table-hover: true
---

The frameworks in cybedtools matter most when someone has a
specific job to do with them. Each page below walks through a
realistic working scenario. Who the person is, what they need to
know, and how cybedtools gets them there.

The personas are composite, not specific individuals. The questions,
the data, and the code are real.

::: {.column-margin}
For the analytic shape behind each scenario (the underlying
cross-framework query), see [Under the hood](../queries/index.qmd).
:::
